create.title: New quote request
create.subtitle: Send your brief to the vendor. You'll be notified when they respond.

message.label: Message to the vendor
message.placeholder: Tell the vendor what you need…

errors.EVENT_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find that event, or you don't have permission to use it.
errors.EVENT_NOT_ACTIVE: You can only request quotes for active events.
errors.VENDOR_NOT_AVAILABLE: This vendor is no longer available.
errors.INVALID_BRIEF: Please review the brief: some fields have an invalid format.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: The selected service category is not available.
errors.QR_ALREADY_ACTIVE: You already have an active request to this vendor for this event.
errors.QR_CATEGORY_LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached the maximum of 5 active requests per category.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to send the request.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot create quote requests.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
